infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: LoadTimeline records the GPS location of each load event so your documentation proves where it happened.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: LoadTimeline uses the camera to attach photos of freight, seals, and damage to your load timeline.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: LoadTimeline lets you attach photos from your library to load events and incidents.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: LoadTimeline records the GPS location of each load event so your documentation proves where it happened.

plugins.photosPermission: LoadTimeline lets you attach photos from your library to load events and incidents.
plugins.cameraPermission: LoadTimeline uses the camera to attach photos of freight, seals, and damage to your load timeline.
